sections.paragraph:
Original: נס

Transliteration: nês

Phonetic: nace

BDB Definition:

  1. something lifted up, standard, signal, signal pole, ensign, banner, sign, sail
    1. standard (as rallying point), signal
    2. standard (pole)
    3. ensign, signal

Origin: from H5264

TWOT entry: 1379a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
